---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest something MusicRipper should do that it currently doesn't.
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

<!--
MusicRipper is a personal project (no SLA on review). Feature
requests are welcome but the maintainer will weigh them against the
project's documented mission: parent-friendly bit-perfect FLAC
ripping with AccurateRip verification, MusicBrainz tagging, and
Plex-ready library layout. See README.md for the elevator pitch and
docs/DECISIONS.md for the architectural decision log.
-->

the proposed solution for now -- describe the situation that makes
you want a new feature in the first place. -->

### Proposed solution

<!-- What would the ideal user experience look like? UI sketches,
config-field shapes, CLI invocations -- whatever feels concrete. -->

### Alternatives considered

<!-- Workarounds you've tried, other tools that solve the same
problem differently, "do nothing" if that's an option. -->

### Anything else
